sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72096" key="o(doure/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁδουρ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n72096.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">keep, watch the road,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
